messages.content: All the objects that we see in the world around us, are made of ____. It makes up the air we breathe, the ground we walk on, the food we eat and the animals and plants that live around us. Even our own human bodies are made of matter!
All the objects that we see in the world around us are made of matter.
The earliest canoes were made ____ tree trunks.
The earliest canoes were made from tree trunks.

A: What’s this table made Ответ
?

B: It’s oak, American white oak.

A: What’s this table made of?

B: It’s made of oak, specifically American white oak.

They were living in tents made Ответ
 old plastic sheets.
They were living in tents made from old plastic sheets.
Is sushi always made ____ raw fish or do the Japanese use cooked fish too?
Is sushi always made with raw fish or do the Japanese use cooked fish too?
The body of this vehicle is coated ____ fiberglass.
The body of this vehicle is coated with fiberglass.
Milk is made ____ butter and cheese
Milk is made into butter and cheese.
This skateboard was made ____ a regular screwdriver.
This skateboard was made with a regular screwdriver.

When this combination was heated under pressure, it was Ответ
 everything from combs to dolls and ping pong balls.
When this combination was heated under pressure, it was transformed into everything from combs to dolls and ping pong balls.
